title: tragacantha larica
intro: Tragacantha larica, also known as the Lesser Burnet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family and is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha larica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of its flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
